reviews.review_description: the models in the gallery Are inaccurate but the games great
You pilot the mech with your actual right controller and the sub ship with your left. Love this game and the story. I’m a nerd for space themes and this one is an easy buy

reviews.review_title: Did you ever have a toy Starfighter ?
reviews.review_description: If you ever owned a toy spaceship, that you wished was real, or wanted to be teleported into galaga, this game is for you. Far better than the 1.50 I paid for it, this game is a blast, pun intended.

I wasn’t expecting very much from it, but after playing the free trial I knew I would need more.   Bought the full version and I’ve absolutely no regrets. 

Thank you, this is a great wee game

developer_response.body: Thank you very much. We are always happy when we can surprise people.

reviews.review_description: Major flaw! I don't want to say what the issue is because it will ruin the game. How do I email you guys?

developer_response.body: THX. You can find all contact options on our website: https://twoguys.games/david/

reviews.review_description: This game is a blast! I love the humor on being a janitor and trying to save the universe! I did the trial then popped in to buy it ASAP! Give it a try!

developer_response.body: The universe needs more janitors like you!

reviews.review_description: This flat to VR wave shooter is a blast to jump into and take on a battle fleet. The more I play, the more fun I have. My kids love jumping in for a quick match. I like the space ship and its drone connected to your hqnd. If you don't keep them dodging rockets and lasers and keep your aim ,your going to take damage...but not much Cruz it doesn't take itself too seriously. This is ment to have fun and it shows. Love it

I have to say I didn't know what to think this game would be like. Having said that, I rather enjoyed this space wave shooter game. It certainly gave my hands, fingers, and wrists a workout. I wanted to just experience the game and have a better chance of completing it, so I did easy difficulty. I might play it again at a harder difficulty, just to see how hard it can get, but what I experienced on easy difficulty was pretty intense, at least for me. This type of game is not one I usually play, but I got this on sale, so that made it easy to say yes to buying it. Overall, it was a fun game, and although repetitive, it still kept me interested to know how it would end. I would recommend this game to others.

A nice space shooting game, and a pleasant surprise as  I think this is one I will come back to quite regularly (few games have me doing this to date), when I just need to relax by shooting up a few waves of enemy space fighters and battleships! Interesting that the ship movements are controlled by the position of  the hand controllers rather than the joystick on the controller… I like having a large and small fighter controlled simultaneously with my right and left arms (multitasking!)
The simple narrative,  that unfolds at your pace as you press the trigger, also provides a useful pause between waves too. Music is atmospheric as others have mentioned. 
I got this in the Summer Sale for £1.99 which I think is a real bargain. Good job developers!

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you so much for this incredibly kind review! It genuinely means a lot to hear that our game has become one you'll 'come back to quite regularly' for some relaxing shooting. That's exactly the vibe we were hoping to create!

reviews.review_description: The game is original but too difficult even at the normal level (which is my standard). When you get to the boss of the third level it becomes impossible because there is too much to pay attention to. So you are no longer having fun but you are grinding your teeth.

developer_response.body: Yes, some of the final bosses are quite challenging. A little tip: Starting at level 3, you can use Time Warp (right controller - grip button). This slow down time and makes it easier to hit the shield satellites. Hope this helps. Otherwise, get in touch with us again.

reviews.review_description:
I like it, exciting and difficult to win, its not just a game which you can win from the first round.
One note for the developer, there is a bug, when you loose the game, the left drone continues working, so you can shoot down ships, so you can win the game while its over at the same time, which will make the app unresponsive.
Give us more.......... Please 😊

reviews.review_title: Immersive fights and so much fun
reviews.review_description:
This game is such a hidden gem and so much fun to play. It's relaxing, engaging and challenging at the same time, which is a sweet spot only few games manage to hit.

David is also a wonderful example of how much better VR can be compared mobile, console or desktop games. It's so much immersive to be floating in space with your hands acting as spaceships, so you haven to constantly move around to win the game.

I also love that this game was just built by two guys (with clearly a lot of dedication and eye for detail). I hope Meta (and many more players who buy this game) supports this little gem of the VR world.

Update, 3.weeks later:
I have now finished the game on the most difficult setting and really enjoyed coming back to it again and again for about 4 weeks now. The game can be finished within 2 hours, so luckily, the developers have  included a total of 5 difficulty levels, so one can play the game five times (and the harder difficulty levels took me more than 2 hours). I can only recommend it highly 🙂
The game is missing a tutorial. How do I use the special weapons? I keep getting hit by things I can't see. I will update later.
Always love me a good shmup. Hopefully y'all make another. Maybe one with UN Squadron vibes. Haha One can dream. Old-school Shoot emup fans need to check this out!

developer_response.body: Oh yeah — a UN Squadron game. Sounds good to us — we'll keep that in mind.

reviews.review_description: This is actually an awesome game.  I don't really care for wave-shooters, but David is really enjoyable and addictive.  I can't believe I had never heard of it--I've owned every Quest ever made and this gem must have been consigned to the old App Lab where nobody could find it.  Look, I'm not exaggerating, this is a super-nice, highly polished title.  You can tell the devs obsessed over it--from the "gallery" where you can view each ship (including salient info) to the top-notch soundtrack--it's shocking how a game this good floundered because of Meta's (now abandoned) policy of consigning such indie games to the App Lab.  David is great and absolutely deserves your time.  It looks beautiful (for a simple wave shooter) and the gameplay is shockingly awesome.  Don't overlook this app, it's well worth your time, it's super fun, and is priced below what it should be.

developer_response.body: Hello. You did a very good guess. Like you said - it's hard to be found in the App Lab. Now that we have access to the main store it's still hard, but at least we have a chance to be found. So we're happy to hear about your feedback. We're actually just two guys and we made the game for some space fun of ourself and also for others. Thank us so much for playing! Best, Peter

reviews.review_title: Brilliant space game, one of the best.
reviews.review_description:
Definitely recommend this especially for the price, can't go wrong, honestly. 

Just get it for the price.

developer_response.body: It makes us very happy to hear that you had such a great experience with our game. Thank you for your positive review.

reviews.review_description: wonderful game........yes very cool

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback! We're delighted you're enjoying our game so much. We hope you continue to have a lot of fun!

reviews.review_description: For 0.99p on offer it's the purchase of the year. Brilliant game and soundtrack. Gameplay is slick and efficient. BUY IT 🤠
gorgeous graphics, sound and fantastic gameplay❤️

developer_response.body: We're absolutely thrilled you're so obsessed! Your appreciation for the graphics, sound, and gameplay means the world to us.

reviews.review_description: Just check the trailer. If you like it you will like the game too.

Tried this as it has good graphics and I like space games. And I admit it's fun! Smooth and good gameplay. I'd add some more complex mechanics to make use of the buttons but for quick and direct fun it's highly recommended.  Cheers!!

This is a really wonderfully done wave shooter game. The setting is beautiful and the controls are pretty easy to get the hang of. Gameplay was very smooth and I had no issues with lag or loading. There are 5 levels with multiple stages in each and each stage gets increasingly more difficult. There are also 5 difficulty levels ranging from easy to master, so you can find one that challenges you just right.

You are taking down motherships which are releasing soldier drones so you have to balance your offensive attacks between waves of drones and the boss ship as well as dodge incoming enemy fire. I found myself playing for much longer than I intended the first time I played! I recommend this really fun shooter game, especially for such a great price!

reviews.review_title: Better than expected but controls laggy
reviews.review_description:
This is a really well made game and is exciting to play.  It's a very tough game and it does have an addictive quality.  I do want to keep coming back to it for one more go after i fail.  

There are a few small problems that stop it from being great.  You are not given enough info about what the powerups do or what penalties you can pick up and how to remove them from your ship, so you are left a bit confused in the beginning.  Also, the ship does lag behind your hand movements.  If the Devs can massively reduce the lag with the controls then i will change my score to 5 stars.

I wasn’t expecting this game to be as polished as it is but Wowsers. Each planet looks completely different aesthetically, and the enemies are pretty dang cool too. Give it a go… these are the type of games I love supporting. 

25% Off Code (delete space between “.com”

https://www.oculus. com/appreferrals/PowPow55/3891771757540892/?utm_source=2

I played the demo of David yesterday, after a long pause of months... And again, i am surprised how much fun it is. Blasting space ships, trying to beat my highscore. Played on my old Quest 1 and works super.

Amazing little game, can tell the small development team put a lot of love into it. Love the way it adds abilities as the plot progresses. The first set of missions are not indicative of where the game ends up. You start off using one controller to fly your ship in a 360 degree bullet hell wave shooter. Later levels will have you independently controlling two ships, directing attack squads, guiding missiles to sensitive targets with your head and slowing time to dodge between missiles. The progression is nice, you don't feel overwhelmed as it adds abilities.

reviews.review_title: It keeps crashing and no save option
reviews.review_description:
It keeps locking up before I get through the 1st level.  And when it does NOT crash I have to keep starting from "New Game."  Also the opening is waaaaay too long. I do not want to wait what feels like forrver to see the title graphics and get started.

Before I return it for refund is there any chance these will be addressed any time soon?

Happy New Year and best of luck with this otherwise pretty fun game.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the trouble. It shouldn't crash at all ... Do you have Quest 1 or 2? The prologue actually only appears when you start it for the first time. But if the automatic save does not work - level reached or back in the hangar - it will be played again. We have to correct this with the next update.

reviews.review_description: Save your money or just open the window and chuck it out.....Worth $1 at a push

Poor design choices:
- own bullets are hard to see (especially in some areas of light background)
- no progression (you get reset to 0 on death, yet enemies stay the same as the highest level you reached)
- sluggish, frustrating controls
- enemies shooting at you from behind

Bugs: 
- powerups going into floor or outside play space

This is a great game for winding down to, great music and story line. It’s strangely addictive. I have gotten past level one nothing to do with the game. More a time issue on my part. But I keep coming back to it. The graphics are clear and properly 3-D. Great game!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much and I hope you had the time to check out the other levels as well.

reviews.review_description:
I bought this a while ago, and never gave it the attention it deserved. Completed stage one, and then......wow!!!!! That's when the game truly comes into its glory. This game is so addictive, and visually beautiful. Totally immersive. One of my top 5 games. The whole game has a very slick style too it, and is very satisfying to play. 

If I had to give one criticism, it would have to be I want more of it! 
Please please please add more levels. This should be on the main store. And way more polished than many other space shooters on the main store.

 This is a superbly executed space shooter.

reviews.review_title: Experience a New Kind of Art and Emotion
reviews.review_description:
Get dope games on Quest and Rift with 25% discount via my promo link below:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1HlKRBcELJeY3i5woZsO2cu6KtcO_8o8QYexyLFmtaNY/edit?usp=sharing

This VR game provides a Sci-fi space battle experience filled with excitement. Using the VR device, I felt fully immersed and the stunning visual effects were truly amazing. The sound design was also great, especially when played through headphones, making the game's audio come to life. The control experience was also good, with the design of the controllers being easy to use. The storyline and missions of the game were also fun and kept my attention throughout. Overall, this VR game is a four-star experience that provides a challenging and adventurous gaming experience with good visuals and sound, as well as a good control experience. If you enjoy Sci-Fi games, then this game is definitely worth trying.
Great idea and nice graphics, currently on sale for less than the price of a sandwich

Massively impressed by this game !
Visually stunning with dark undertones that gives you a great “ experience “ and intense gameplay wether playing standing or sitting but start moving & it gets even better. I’m interested to know why this isn’t available via the Oculus store or promoted more ? I haven’t been more addicted to a game since Space pirate trainer came out. Congrats guys .

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! We worked on the dark undertone in particular for a long time until the lighting mood and the sound corresponded to our ideas.

reviews.review_description:
Very sharp graphics (quest 2). everything very lovingly designed. The game is fun, you avoid the enemy missiles with the ship and shoot the enemy and collect items. This is how you complete stage by stage.
Im in hope for more content soon.

This free app lab game ist better than a few full price games in the oculus store..

developer_response.body:
wooha, thx you so much for your kind word.
we are close lauch the fulll version. we hope to see you on our discord channel for our upcoming beta testing phase.

best, peter

reviews.review_description: Wow its realy great Game. I have so much fun. It looks very good.

Why bother writing a review to just rehash what prior posters have said. 

Out of all the crap that’s on app lab, I found a game that is an experience….

I “was” impressed in the first 1 minute with the story, The first 5 missions were unique and fun Then I played the 2nd campaign. Holy F@&$)ng cow bells! 

Get this and then throw money at the devs so we can stick an I.V to their arms filled with energy drinks!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the "energy drinks"! We'll use them for more exciting updates.

reviews.review_description: Love this game, fun for quick sessions. The scale gets me every time, that “ohh sh…!” when a huge boss ship jumps right in front of you.

developer_response.body: Happy New Year and thank you so much. We love to hear that you like our Big Boss Ships! That's what VR is made for...

reviews.review_description: Das Spiel ist echt Super, nur ein bisschen überladen also ich meine da kommt ziemlich viel Zeug auf einmal angeflogen und man muss ganz schön aufpassen, daher nicht so leicht zu spielen. Optik und Musik sind top. Die Upgrades könnten etwas schneller und öfter droppen.

developer_response.body: Stimmt, es ist echt viel los im Weltraum und man muss in Bewegung bleiben. Fast schon eine Space Fitness App. Die Upgrades bekommst du immer, wenn du eine komplette Welle an Angreifern abgeschossen hast. Viel Spass weiterhin mit DAVID
